tiktok.caption: Your HSA could be worth $395,000 — but only if you stop using it like a debit card

youtube_short.title: The HSA Trick Worth $395,000 Nobody Tells You
title_alternatives: Stop Using Your HSA Like a Debit Card ($395K Mistake)
68% of People Are Wasting Their HSA — Don't Be One of Them
youtube_short.description: Most people swipe their HSA card at the pharmacy and never think about it again. But your HSA has a triple tax advantage — contributions are pre-tax, growth is tax-free, and withdrawals are tax-free for medical. Invest $4,150 a year at 7% for 30 years and you're looking at $395,000 completely tax-free. After 65 it becomes a second IRA you can use for literally anything. 68% of HSA holders never invest their balance. Don't be one of them. #HSA #PersonalFinance #RetirementTips #WealthBuilding #MoneyMoves
